summaries.title: MCP server `local_json_fallback` silently drops lesson data — `withFallback()` must detect it
summaries.summary: The MCP server's `_handleLocalFallback` returns `{success:true, source:"local_json_fallback"}` without actually storing lesson data, causing `withFallback()` to silently drop lessons because it only catches thrown errors. The fix adds detection of `source === "local_json_fallback"` to trigger proper fallback to local storage and retry queue. Key takeaway: when building fallback chains, never trust `success: true` from upstream components—always inspect the `source` field to verify data was actually persisted.
